title: workspaces — model traits
description: Trait contract this module contributes (owned) and consumes (from foundation + framework). Traits are the composition unit Laravel modules use to add cross-cutting behaviour without inheritance: a model composes several traits and picks up the columns, scopes, casts, and event hooks each one adds.

owned.description: Every domain row below Workspace on the hierarchy uses this. Adds a `workspace_id` column contract, an auto-fill saving hook, and a global scope that filters reads to the resolved workspace.

compositeIndexes.description: Covers the scan-by-workspace read pattern every workspace repo issues. Leftmost prefix also covers plain `WHERE workspace_id = ?`.

global.name: WorkspaceScope
global.description: Applied at boot. Filters every read to the workspace resolved by the `resolve.workspace` middleware. Bypass via `Model::withoutGlobalScope(WorkspaceScope::class)` — permitted only inside platform-admin contexts.

eventHooks.description: Auto-fills `workspace_id` on new rows from the resolved workspace. Refuses cross-workspace writes with `WorkspaceException::crossWorkspaceAccess()` (400).

owned.description: Sibling of BelongsToWorkspace for rows where workspace_id may legitimately be NULL. Two use cases: (1) platform-wide catalogue rows (system SmsOptOut, spam-trap MailSuppression, system-level Audit rows for deploys / cron); (2) cross-workspace boundary rows carrying context from the platform side. Adds the `workspace_id` column contract (nullable), the same auto-fill saving hook (from the resolved workspace when present, null otherwise), and an OPTIONAL global scope that filters rows where workspace_id matches the resolved workspace OR workspace_id IS NULL (platform-wide rows visible to every workspace).

compositeIndexes.description: Covers per-workspace scans AND platform-wide (workspace_id IS NULL) scans via leftmost-prefix.

global.name: WorkspaceOptionalScope
global.description: Applied at boot. `WHERE workspace_id = ? OR workspace_id IS NULL`. Platform-wide rows are visible to every workspace. Bypass via `Model::withoutGlobalScope(WorkspaceOptionalScope::class)` in platform-admin contexts.

eventHooks.description: Auto-fills `workspace_id` from the resolved workspace when a workspace IS resolved AND the caller has not explicitly set workspace_id=null. When the caller sets workspace_id=null and holds the platform.settings.write-system permission, the null is accepted (platform-wide write).

owned.description: Applied to rows at the workspaces boundary (Workspace, Identity, Domain). Adds `application_id` column contract + auto-fill hook + BelongsTo relation. Does NOT add a global scope — application resolution is host-based and lives in the resolve.workspace middleware.

eventHooks.description: Auto-fills `application_id` on new rows from the resolved application (bound by host resolution).

notAppliedBy: Every model that composes BelongsToWorkspace — the workspace_id already implies the application through the FK graph.

consumed.description: Standard Laravel factory support. Applied to every model this module owns.
String primary keys backed by ULID. Applied to every model this module owns (with the prefix layered on top via HasSystemFlag's boot hook or the model's own $keyPrefix).

Adds an `is_system` boolean column plus `system()` / `custom()` query scopes and `isSystem()` / `isCustom()` accessors. Rows the platform seeds are marked `is_system=true` and refused on `Policy@update` / `@delete`.

Adds a `metadata` JSONB column + `array` cast + fluent accessors (`getMetadata($key, $default)`, `setMetadata($key, $value)`, `mergeMetadata(array $bag)`, `forgetMetadata($key)`). Applied to every persistent model in this module for a uniform free-form attribute bag. NEVER queried, always internal / platform-facing (data-classes.json tier `restricted`). Hidden from the wire by default.
Adds the userstamp trio (`created_by`, `updated_by`, `deleted_by`) and auto-fills them from the resolved caller on save / update / soft-delete.
Wraps `owen-it/laravel-auditing`. Writes an audit row for every mutation. Applied to every model this module owns so lifecycle changes always emit an audit trail.
consumed.note: Depends on the `audit` module having `workspace_id` on its `audits` table — see the workspaces-columns.md living gap register.

consumed.description: Applied to every model except DomainRecord (which is diff-state, not lifecycle-tracked).

compositionExample.note: Every workspace-scoped domain model composes traits in this order — framework first (HasFactory, HasUlids), then workspaces boundary traits (BelongsToApplication / BelongsToWorkspace), then foundation traits (HasSystemFlag / HasUserstamps / HasAuditable), then framework tail (SoftDeletes), then any module-specific traits.

blueprintExample.note: Migrations compose the paired schema macros in the same order the model composes traits. `->workspaceable()` adds workspace_id + FK + composite index in one call.
